title: Freelance Real Estate Creative — Social Media Reels, Print Mailers & Marketing Design

fix.prompt_delta: Twilight exterior of a contemporary South Florida mega-mansion: flat or low-pitch roof, white stucco, floor-to-ceiling glass, lush tropical landscaping, warm interior glow, dramatic sunset sky; photorealistic architectural photography style.

evidence: 6x9in + 0.125in bleed at 300dpi assumption is sound EDDM standard — client would accept without question

fix.prompt_delta: Remove the decision to exclude Reels. The workflow includes steps for video creation and resizing, which should be utilized to produce Instagram and Facebook Reels as requested by the client.

top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 9): The entire workflow is built on Adobe Express while the client explicitly demands Canva-only work inside their shared team account — this is a fundamental platform mismatch that invalidates every deliverable before a single pixel is placed.

AGENT CHOKE on 'agent_headshot': The headshot shows a male agent but listing_data names the agent as 'Victoria Sterling' — a clear gender mismatch the automated agent cannot reconcile when populating agent identity fields, causing it to stall or produce brand-damaging output on the very first personalized asset.
Task Fit 6/10: Headshot gender contradicts named agent Victoria Sterling in listing_data
qc_gaps: Per-asset self-QC averages 9.0/10, but package Task Fit scored 6 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
